name: ruby-equalizer
title: ruby-equalizer
summary: Module to define equality, equivalence and inspection methods
description:
Module to define equality, equivalence and inspection methods
Define equality, equivalency and hash methods automatically. When you create
an equalizer object you can use all these methods automatically.
.
See /usr/share/doc/ruby-equalizer/README.md for a complete example.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-equalizer because Module to define equality, equivalence and inspection methods.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-equalizer as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-equalizer with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-equalizer --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
